data.body: Session close (Fable reconciler, resumes c18e-6b87-cde8-4148). Delivered: (1) epic bbf1 design wall resolved via the canonical-comparison principle (core diffs only canonical shapes; vendor payloads cross core opaquely via InboundMapper ingestion / OutboundMapper emission — parity with inbound_differ.py:159). (2) Epic re-planned: 97f2 re-scoped to scalar port surface; new children 625b (canonical field+label+baseline diff, resolve_assignee 3-state, map_fields_to_remote, ADR 0035 §(d) amendment), eefd (canonical link diff), aff0 (SupportsAbsenceProbe), 21ca (rich-text/comment limits via FieldSanitizer/InboundMapper), ad44 (reconcile_check canonicalization, depends_on 625b). Epic + all 6 open children hold certified plan-review PASS attestations (review iterations fixed real gaps: nested-import AST walker, vendor-shaped arbitration baseline canonicalized at read, resolve_assignee authoritative flag, emission mechanism pinned, probe wiring order at run_differs.py:230/234, reconcile_check coverage). (3) Gerrit change 920 ABANDONED with rationale; scalar subset cherry-pickable from worktree impl-4af8-differ-di. (4) Follow-up 556a (relocate inbound_fields.py) filed discovered_from bbf1, out of epic scope. (5) Process bug 790c-a7a3-120a-42c8 filed: review-plan PASS ends unsigned under concurrent store writes (generation.py:146-154 fail-closed too strict; message wrongly demands re-review; sign-review certifies from same sidecar) — hit 5/8 passing reviews this session. (6) Handoff prompt for /rebar-implement bbf1 delivered to operator: suggested order 97f2/aff0/21ca (independent) -> 625b -> eefd + ad44 (ad44 only after 625b merges). Nothing claimed; all children open and claimable.
